Name: Grid Controller ESP32
Description: EVAL BOARD FOR ESP-WROOM-32

Name: House Monitor ESP32
Description: EVAL BOARD FOR ESP-WROOM-32

Name: Grid Current Sensor
Description: Measures AC current in the main power line using Hall effect, providing an analog voltage output. Provides galvanic isolation.

Name: House Current Sensor
Description: Measures AC current in the main power line using Hall effect, providing an analog voltage output. Provides galvanic isolation.

Name: Audible Alarm Buzzer
Description: Active buzzer module to produce the doorbell sound.

Name: Status LCD Display
Description: Displays system status, temperatures, and operational mode.

Name: System 5V DC Power Supply
Description: Wall adapter providing 5V DC power to the system.

Name: Tower A Base Plate
Description: Base plate for Tower A, representing the utility grid.

Name: Tower B Base Plate
Description: Base plate for Tower B, representing the authorized household.

Name: Tower A Vertical Support Front
Description: Front vertical support for mounting components in Tower A.

Name: Tower A Vertical Support Back
Description: Rear vertical support for mounting components in Tower A.

Name: Tower B Vertical Support Front
Description: Front vertical support for mounting components in Tower B.

Name: Tower B Vertical Support Back
Description: Rear vertical support for mounting components in Tower B.

Name: Bypass Switch Enclosure
Description: Small plastic enclosure for the bypass switch and bulb wiring.

Name: Grid ESP32 Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the ESP32 microcontroller in Tower A.

Name: House ESP32 Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the ESP32 microcontroller in Tower B.

Name: Grid Current Sensor Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the ACS712 current sensor in Tower A.

Name: House Current Sensor Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the ACS712 current sensor in Tower B.

Name: Power Cutoff Relay Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the single-channel relay module in Tower A.

Name: LCD Display Bezel/Mount
Description: 3D-printed bezel and mount for the 16x2/20x4 LCD display in Tower A.

Name: Buzzer Alarm Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the small buzzer in Tower A.

Name: DC Power Supply Mount
Description: 3D-printed mount for the 5V DC power supply module.

Name: Authorized Bulb Holder
Description: Screw-in lamp holder for the 100W authorized household bulb.

Name: Bypass Bulb Holder
Description: Screw-in lamp holder for the 100W bypass theft simulation bulb.

Name: M3x8mm Screws
Description: Short M3 screws for mounting smaller components and 3D prints.

Name: M3x12mm Screws
Description: Longer M3 screws for mounting through acrylic or into aluminum extrusions.

Name: M3 Nuts
Description: Standard M3 hex nuts for securing screws.

Name: M3x10mm Standoffs
Description: M3 male-female standoffs for stacking PCBs or creating clearance.

Name: Theft Bypass Switch Mount
Description: Adapter plate for the Theft Bypass Switch that bolts to the main chassis with M3 hardware. Includes wire-routing channels.

Name: AC Input Terminal Block
Description: Terminal block for connecting the main AC input power.

Name: Authorized AC Bulb
Description: Simulated authorized household AC load (e.g., 100W light bulb).

Name: Bypass AC Bulb
Description: Simulated power theft AC load (e.g., 100W light bulb).

Name: AC Wire (Grid Live)
Description: Wire for Live AC connections.

Name: AC Wire (Grid Neutral)
Description: Wire for Neutral AC connections.
